games.title: Stars Connection
games.shortDescription: You play as an astronaut floating around planets, and your goal is to connect stars by drawing lines between them.

games.title: Rotate Island
games.shortDescription: Rotate Island is a platformer game. Your character live in a world every platfome can be roate.

games.title: Card Path
games.shortDescription: Card Path is a puzzle, top down game where you need to use magical cards to find your path to the flag.

aboutSection.title: About Cardboard Digital
aboutSection.text: Cardboard Digital Studio is a solo indie studio aiming for its first Steam release in 9 months. Instead of committing to one idea, we first build and test a series of mini-games to discover what works best. Your feedback helps shape the final game.
